headline: Honeywell (HON) Is One Of The Stocks To Buy Before SpaceX IPO
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy Before SpaceX IPO. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) reported its first-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings on April 23. The results were mixed, with the earnings exceeding expectations while revenue came in slightly below estimates. It delivered non-GAAP EPS of $2.45, surpassing forecasts by $0.13. […]
